src: <url to the .zip file created by the release script>
name: Sherpa Speech AI
short: Speech AI objects built on sherpa-onnx
long: Speech and audio AI objects for ossia score, built on sherpa-onnx: speech recognition (streaming and batch ASR), text-to-speech, voice activity detection, audio tagging, keyword spotting, speaker identification, speaker diarization, speech denoising, source separation and text post-processing. The sherpa-onnx runtime library is loaded dynamically at runtime; models are provided separately (see the sherpa-models package).
